markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and address SEO issues arising from duplicate pages created during the WordPress to Webflow migration process.](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Duplicate pages with "webflow.firework.com" subdomain are being indexed, causing SEO concerns](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Two immediate actions: 1) Update robots.txt to stop crawling of webflow subdomain pages 2) Implement 301 redirects from webflow subdomain to main domain](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Complexity arises due to the current nginx proxy setup during transition phase](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [CMS access and publishing process on Webflow explained to the content team](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### SEO Issue: Duplicate Pages

  - [Webflow migration creating duplicate pages with "webflow.firework.com" subdomain](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [\~7-8 pages currently indexed by Google on the webflow subdomain](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Concern: Duplicate content, potential loss of ranking history](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Proposed Solutions

1.  Update robots.txt:
    
      - [Prevent crawling of webflow.firework.com pages](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [Cameron to implement ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)

2.  301 Redirects:
    
      - [Redirect webflow.firework.com pages to corresponding firework.com URLs](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
      - [Challenges due to nginx proxy setup](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Options discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
        [a. JavaScript redirect (window.location.replace)](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
        [b. Webflow's built-in redirect functionality with regex](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
      - [Concerns about search engine interpretation of JavaScript redirects](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)

3.  Canonical URLs:
    
      - [Mentioned but noted as not a directive, may be ignored by Google](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

### Technical Setup Explanation

  - [Current setup uses nginx proxy](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Fetches content from both Webflow and WordPress during transition](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Goal: Eventually transition fully to Webflow and remove WordPress/nginx proxy](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

### Webflow CMS Access and Publishing

  - [Process for accessing Webflow CMS demonstrated](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Login URL: firework.com?edit](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Navigation of Webflow interface for creating/editing blog posts shown](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cameron: Update robots.txt to stop crawling of webflow.firework.com pages](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Jorge: Start email thread with Webflow support to discuss best redirect implementation](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Prateek: Hand over Webflow CMS access and instructions to web development team](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
  - [Team: Await Webflow support's recommendation on implementing redirects without causing infinite loops](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Monitor SEO impact and ensure ranking history is preserved during the transition](https://fathom.video/share/2R2zz5RWCAjCFW-L-Z5uiTiTV3gG_xVT?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
